calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 -
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:48am and concluding at 9:57am.

Plaintiff Zemoso Technologies Inc. appearing represented by Shakti Jaydutt Vadgama, Esq. via zoom.
Defendants Saans Health Labs, LLC and Raju Kattumensu not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff Chief Executive Officer SATISH MADHIRA via zoom and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Zemoso Technologies, and against Defendants Saans Health Labs, LLC and Raju Kattumensu, as follows:

Damages: $1,137,922.88
Prejudgment Interest: $161,491.52
Attorney Fees: $11,284.50
Costs: $880.10

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $1,311,579.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Continued To Mar-18-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
